attributes.description: CPU time, utilization, per-core headroom, and load averages for host capacity triage.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type":"markdown","embeddableConfig":{"content":"## [System Host OTel] CPU and load

Use this view when investigating compute saturation: how busy cores are, how time is spent, and how load compares to the CPU count.
- Cumulative CPU time as a per-second share by state from counters
- Per-state utilization gauges averaged over the time range
- Per-core non-idle share and all three load averages with time","hide_title":true,"settings":{"open_links_in_new_tab":true}},"panelIndex":"807c441b-489d-4903-87c0-e6900035187f","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"807c441b-489d-4903-87c0-e6900035187f"}},{"type":"vis","embeddableConfig":{"title":"m1","hide_title":true,"attributes":{"visualizationType":"lnsMetric","title":"","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"layer_0":{"index":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*-a5054c6504c49b8e50d4e940111cec7fe28ec3649cc665afef0dddf2a4fe2761","query":{"esql":"TS metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*
